element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation for all subsequent movement challenges
Fighting guards and swordsmen throughout levels 1-12
Plot device; forces health drain and introduces shadow mechanic
Story integration; removes player agency momentarily
Sword duel after invisible bridge crossing

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty with narrative interventions; early levels teach mechanics, mid-levels introduce supernatural complications, final levels combine all elements with time pressure and story climax

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Large potions (red/green) for stat increases suggest optional deeper exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Multiple colored potions with consequences teach risk assessment; blue poison potions teach caution

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-focused (levels 1-2): introduce sword combat, basic platforming, health system, potion mechanics; minimal supernatural elements
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Complexity escalation (levels 3-8): skeleton enemy variant teaching new kill strategy, magic mirror plot twist (level 4), doppelgänger harassment (levels 5-7), multiple trap types combined, princess rescue subplot (level 8)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Convergence (levels 9-12): perspective inversion challenge (level 9), all prior mechanics present simultaneously, doppelgänger final merge requirement, invisible bridge crossing, Jaffar final duel; 60-minute timer pressure throughout

notable_level_patterns.description: Progression from individual trap types (spike/pit/guillotine) to combinations requiring precise navigation windows; gates add puzzle layer of activation timing
Regular guards (killable by sword) → Skeletal swordsman (pit-kill only) → Doppelgänger (unkillable, must merge) → Jaffar (final duel); each requires adapted combat strategy
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 3 skeleton, Level 4 mirror, Level 12 Jaffar

notable_level_patterns.description: Magic mirror serves as narrative pivot point, introducing shadow mechanic that haunts protagonist through multiple levels before resolution
Left-to-right progression through dungeon chambers with vertical sections (climbing, falling); gates and traps create horizontal gating mechanisms
